name: Northern Steak & Shrimp Filling (Dim Sum--See
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 24
1. In a bowl combine the steak, cider vinegar, mustard powder, and soy sauce. Marinade in the refrigerator for one hour, stirring occasionally. Drain. Reserve the marinade.
2. In another bowl combine the shrimp and lemon juice. Cover and place in the refrigerator for one hour.
3. Heat oil in a wok over low heat. Add the meat mixture and leek.
4. Raise the heat to high and stir-fry for half a minute.
5. Add the zucchini and reserved meat marinade. Stir-fry for one minute. Remove from heat.
6. In the same wok, stir-fry the shrimp, scallions, sherry, and water chestnuts for half a minute or until the shrimp turn pink. Remove from heat.
7. Combine the shrimp and meat mixtures and add cilantro.
8. Assemble wontons and fry or boil.
Variation: Use pork instead of steak.
